LOGIN.HERO_DESC: Join thousands of successful vendors on the Zadana platform and expand your business in the largest food marketplace.
LOGIN.ERR_LOGIN_FAILED: Unable to sign in. Please check your details and try again.
LOGIN.ERR_INVALID_CREDENTIALS: The email or password you entered is incorrect.
LOGIN.ERR_ACCOUNT_NOT_ALLOWED: This account is not allowed to sign in right now.
LOGIN.ERR_ACCOUNT_LOCKED: This account is temporarily locked. Please contact support or try again later.
LOGIN.ERR_SERVER_UNREACHABLE: We could not reach the server right now. Make sure the API is running or check your network connection, then try again.
LOGIN.ERR_SERVER_ERROR: A server error occurred. Please try again in a moment.

ONBOARDING.TITLE: Store Setup
ONBOARDING.SUBTITLE: Simple steps to activate your store and start selling

STEP_DESCRIPTIONS.BASIC: Store identity and business activity details

SUCCESS_PAGE.TITLE: Application Submitted Successfully!
SUCCESS_PAGE.DESCRIPTION: Thank you for joining Zadana. Our team is currently reviewing your store details to ensure they meet our standards.
SUCCESS_PAGE.PENDING_HINT: The review process typically takes 24 to 48 business hours. You will receive an email as soon as your account is activated.
SUCCESS_PAGE.REVIEW_HERO_TITLE: Your store profile is now under review
SUCCESS_PAGE.REVIEW_HERO_DESCRIPTION: This illustration confirms that the vendor profile has entered the review queue and will remain in this state until the super admin team completes validation.

ERRORS.START_FROM_REGISTER: Please start from the register page first to complete the account credentials.
ERRORS.SUBMIT_FAILED: Unable to submit the vendor registration right now.

ONBOARDING.SYNC_SOURCE_HELP: This data is synced from super admin for easier review
ONBOARDING.UPLOAD_LOGO_HELP: Please upload a clear store logo image (JPG, PNG)
ONBOARDING.UPLOAD_CR_HELP: Upload a copy of your CR as PDF or image

PRODUCTS.LIST_SUBTITLE: View and edit your product stock and prices
PRODUCTS.EMPTY_DESC: Start by adding products from the general catalog
PRODUCTS.BANK_SUBTITLE: Choose from available products in the master catalog
PRODUCTS.REQUEST_HINT: If you can't find the product, you can request to add it
PRODUCTS.REQUESTS_SUBTITLE: Track the product, brand, and category requests you have sent to the Zadana team.
PRODUCTS.REQUESTS_EMPTY_DESC: When you submit a new product, brand, or category request, it will appear here right away.
PRODUCTS.AGREE_POLICIES: I agree to product listing and pricing policies.
PRODUCTS.CATALOG_DESC_NOTE: This description comes from the master catalog and cannot be edited here.
PRODUCTS.REQUEST_MISSING_BRAND_HINT: Turn this on if the product belongs to a brand that does not exist yet.
PRODUCTS.REQUEST_MISSING_CATEGORY_HINT: Turn this on if you need a completely new category for this product.
PRODUCTS.BRAND_MODAL_DESC: Pick an existing brand or create a new one.
PRODUCTS.CATEGORY_MODAL_DESC: Pick an existing category or add a new one with hierarchy details.
PRODUCTS.DETAILS_SUBTITLE: Review product details, pricing, and stock.
PRODUCTS.DISCOUNT_HELPER: Enter the discount percentage to calculate the original price automatically.
PRODUCTS.REQUEST_NEW_SUBTITLE: Submit a request to add a new product to the master catalog.
PRODUCTS.SUBMIT_NEW_PRODUCT_DESC: If you cannot find your product in the catalog, request to add it now.
PRODUCTS.REQUEST_SUBMITTED_SUCCESS: Product request submitted successfully, it will be reviewed by admin.

OFFERS.TITLE: Offers & Discounts
OFFERS.SUBTITLE: Track discounted products and update their offers quickly.

FILTERS.TITLE: Filters
FILTERS.SUBTITLE: Filter results through separate fields similar to super admin pages.

CREATE.COUPON_HINT: Create a new code, define the discount type, and set usage rules.
CREATE.CATEGORY_HINT: Launch a focused category campaign with a clear discount and duration.
CREATE.CLEARANCE_HINT: Pick a low-stock product and push it faster before it runs out.
CREATE.MODAL_HELP: New offers are saved directly inside the current vendor workspace.
CREATE.NOTE_AR_PLACEHOLDER: Explain the purpose of this coupon or campaign in Arabic.
CREATE.NOTE_EN_PLACEHOLDER: Explain the purpose of this coupon or campaign in English.
CREATE.CATEGORY_NOTE_AR_PLACEHOLDER: Write the operational or marketing note in Arabic.
CREATE.CATEGORY_NOTE_EN_PLACEHOLDER: Write the operational or marketing note in English.
CREATE.NO_LOW_STOCK_PRODUCTS: There are no eligible products for a last pieces offer right now.
CREATE.NO_LOW_STOCK_PRODUCTS_HINT: Lower stock levels or update quantities from the products page first.

OFFERS.DIRECT_OFFERS_HINT: Live offer prices currently applied to your products.
OFFERS.DIRECT_SECTION_HINT: Review products with active discounts and compare original versus final price.
OFFERS.ACTIVE_COUNT_HINT: Products currently carrying a real offer price.
OFFERS.COUPONS_COUNT_HINT: Discount codes ready for campaigns and traffic pushes.
OFFERS.AVG_DISCOUNT_HINT: Average discount percentage across listed offers.
OFFERS.CLEARANCE_OFFERS_HINT: Low-stock products that need a faster push.
OFFERS.TOTAL_SAVINGS_HINT: Total gap between both prices in {{currency}} per unit.
OFFERS.COUPONS_SUBTITLE: Discount codes for campaigns, ads, and order stimulation.
OFFERS.CATEGORY_SUBTITLE: Quick campaigns that activate a whole category instead of a single product.
OFFERS.CLEARANCE_SUBTITLE: Low-stock products that can move faster through a focused clearance offer.
OFFERS.EMPTY_DIRECT: No direct product offers match the current search.
OFFERS.EMPTY_COUPONS: No coupons match the current search.
OFFERS.EMPTY_CATEGORIES: No category campaigns match the current search.
OFFERS.EMPTY_CLEARANCE: No low-stock products match the current search.
OFFERS.EMPTY_DESC: Add a discount to any product from the products page or product details and it will appear here.

ORDERS.CREATE_MANUAL_ORDER_DESC: Create a new order for your customer directly from here.
ORDERS.REVIEW_BEFORE_SUBMIT: Please review order details before confirming
ORDERS.SEARCH_PLACEHOLDER: Search by order ID or customer name...
ORDERS.EMPTY_DESC: New orders will appear here as soon as they are placed

SETTINGS_PROFILE.TITLE: Vendor profile
SETTINGS_PROFILE.SUBTITLE: Manage the store profile, legal file, banking setup, and review status from one workspace.

COMMAND.ACTIVE_SUBTITLE: Your commercial account is active. Important edits and file re-uploads immediately appear in the admin review workspace.
COMMAND.PENDING_SUBTITLE: Complete the required profile data and official documents, then send the file for review. Every saved update is reflected in the admin side.

WINDOWS.REVIEW_SUMMARY: Official PDFs, legal data, and review readiness.
WINDOWS.OPERATIONS_SUMMARY: Settlement account, payout cycle, and weekly schedule.
WINDOWS.TIMELINE_SUMMARY: Review history, decisions, and recent activity.

UI.REVIEW_HINT: Make sure the commercial registration and tax data match the uploaded documents.

SECTIONS.STORE_HINT: Core business information shown across the vendor panel.
SECTIONS.OWNER_HINT: Personal and contact information for the account owner.
SECTIONS.CONTACT_HINT: Support contacts and the merchant address.
SECTIONS.LEGAL_HINT: Commercial registration, tax details, and operational license.
SECTIONS.HOURS_HINT: Weekly operating availability for receiving and preparing orders.

REVIEW_PANEL.TITLE: Documents and review
REVIEW_PANEL.SUBTITLE: This window mirrors what the admin team sees while reviewing your file.

TIMELINE.TITLE: Timeline and follow-up
TIMELINE.SUBTITLE: Track what changed in the file and how the review team is responding.

NOTICES.REOPEN_TITLE: Changes here will reopen this section for review
NOTICES.REOPEN_SUBMITTED: You can still edit, but important updates or file re-uploads will show up to admin as new review work.
NOTICES.REOPEN_CHANGES_REQUESTED: Apply the requested fixes, save, and re-upload rejected files before resubmitting the profile.

ACTIVATION.TITLE: The profile is ready for internal setup, but commercial activation is still blocked
ACTIVATION.BODY: You can complete the remaining profile, legal, and operating setup here, then submit or resubmit the file for compliance review.

MESSAGES.PDF_ONLY: Official documents must be uploaded as PDF files.
MESSAGES.DOCUMENT_UPLOADED: The document was uploaded and synced to the admin review queue.
MESSAGES.DOCUMENT_UPLOAD_FAILED: Unable to upload the document right now.
MESSAGES.SAVE_INVALID: Please complete the required fields before saving the profile.
MESSAGES.SAVE_SUCCESS: Profile changes were saved and synced to the admin workspace.
MESSAGES.SAVE_FAILED: Unable to save profile changes right now.
MESSAGES.SUBMIT_INVALID: Complete the required data and documents before submitting for review.
MESSAGES.SUBMIT_SUCCESS: The vendor profile was submitted for review and is now visible to admin.
MESSAGES.SUBMIT_FAILED: Unable to submit the profile for review right now.

FORGOT_PASSWORD_PAGE.HERO_DESC: Enter your email and we will help you restore access to your store account securely.

STAFF_BRANCHES.TITLE: Branches & Staff
STAFF_BRANCHES.SUBTITLE: Manage branches, operating teams, and invitation flows from one operational workspace.

SECTIONS.BRANCHES_SUBTITLE: Track your main branch, new branches under review, and operating readiness.
SECTIONS.EMPLOYEES_SUBTITLE: Manage operational roles, branch access, and the current employee status.
SECTIONS.INVITATIONS_SUBTITLE: Resend, revoke, and follow every pending branch manager or employee invitation.

FILTERS.TITLE: Filters
FILTERS.SUBTITLE: Use focused filters to narrow the current table without leaving the page.

SEARCH.BRANCHES: Search by branch, manager, or code
SEARCH.EMPLOYEES: Search by employee name or contact
SEARCH.INVITATIONS: Search by invitation target or contact

EMPTY.BRANCHES: No branches match the active filters.
EMPTY.EMPLOYEES: No employees match the active filters.
EMPTY.INVITATIONS: No invitations match the active filters.

BRANCH_WIZARD.TITLE: Create a sub-branch under the main store
BRANCH_WIZARD.SUBTITLE: Add operational details, assign coverage, and invite the branch manager in one flow.
BRANCH_WIZARD.PRIMARY_WARNING: A primary branch already exists. New entries will be created as sub-branches pending review.
BRANCH_WIZARD.OPERATING_HOURS_HINT: Choose the operating days for this branch before it goes live.

EMPLOYEE_MODAL.TITLE: Invite an employee
EMPLOYEE_MODAL.SUBTITLE: Send an invitation to a regular email address, assign branch access, and start from a ready-made permission template.
EMPLOYEE_MODAL.EDIT_SUBTITLE: Review the role template and fine-tune permissions for the selected employee.
EMPLOYEE_MODAL.BRANCH_ACCESS_HINT: Select the branches this employee can operate in.
EMPLOYEE_MODAL.BRANCH_ACCESS_LOCKED: Branch access stays locked while editing an existing employee in this v1 flow.
EMPLOYEE_MODAL.PERMISSIONS_HINT: Keep the ready template or switch to advanced customization for specific modules.

TEMPLATES.BRANCH_MANAGER_HINT: Best for supervising orders, stock, and offers at one or more branches.
TEMPLATES.ORDERS_CLERK_HINT: Focused on order queue handling, approvals, and shipment follow-up.
TEMPLATES.INVENTORY_CLERK_HINT: Designed for stock updates, inventory checks, and availability changes.

FEEDBACK.BRANCH_CREATED: The new branch was added and a manager invitation was created.
FEEDBACK.EMPLOYEE_INVITED: The employee invitation was sent successfully.
FEEDBACK.LINK_COPY_FALLBACK: Copy failed here. You can still copy the link manually.

BRANCH.OVERVIEW_SUBTITLE: Key operational information for this branch and its current readiness.
BRANCH.HOURS_SUBTITLE: The active schedule used by this branch across the week.
BRANCH.TEAM_SUBTITLE: Employees currently linked to this branch and their operational role.
BRANCH.EMPTY_TEAM: No employees are linked to this branch yet.
BRANCH.MANAGER_SUBTITLE: Primary contact responsible for this branch.
BRANCH.SUMMARY_SUBTITLE: Operational numbers to understand branch readiness at a glance.
BRANCH.INVITATIONS_SUBTITLE: Recent branch-related invitations and their current status.
BRANCH.EMPTY_INVITATIONS: No invitations are linked to this branch.

EMPLOYEE.IDENTITY_SUBTITLE: Identity, role template, and the latest operational activity.
EMPLOYEE.BRANCH_ACCESS_SUBTITLE: Branches this employee can currently operate in.
EMPLOYEE.EMPTY_BRANCHES: No branches are assigned to this employee.
EMPLOYEE.INVITATIONS_SUBTITLE: Invitation records connected to this employee identity.
EMPLOYEE.EMPTY_INVITATIONS: No invitations are linked to this employee.
EMPLOYEE.PERMISSIONS_SUBTITLE: A read-only view of the effective permissions across operational modules.
EMPLOYEE.SUMMARY_SUBTITLE: A compact summary of branch access and invitation coverage.

INVITATION.OVERVIEW_SUBTITLE: Track the target, delivery window, and invitation lifecycle details.
INVITATION.BRANCHES_SUBTITLE: Branches this invitation currently grants access to.
INVITATION.EMPTY_BRANCHES: No branches are linked to this invitation.
INVITATION.LINK_SUBTITLE: Use this direct link when you need to resend or share access manually.
INVITATION.MATCH_SUBTITLE: If the invited person already exists in the team workspace, it appears here.
INVITATION.NO_MATCH: No matching employee was found yet for this invitation.
INVITATION.TIMELINE_SUBTITLE: A quick view of when the invitation was sent and where it stands now.

REVIEWS.TITLE: Customer Reviews Center
REVIEWS.SUBTITLE: Track product and order experience reviews from one workspace, reply as the vendor, and hide reviews when needed without deleting them.

SUMMARY.TOTAL_HINT: All reviews currently stored in this workspace
SUMMARY.PENDING_HINT: Reviews that still need an official vendor response
SUMMARY.HIDDEN_HINT: Reviews currently hidden from the operational view

REVIEWS.SECTION_SUBTITLE: Review every rating, open details, respond to customers, and track what needs attention.

FILTERS.TITLE: Filters
FILTERS.SUBTITLE: Filter by type, stars, visibility, reply state, and date within the same table.

SEARCH.PLACEHOLDER: Search by customer, product, order number, or comment text

EMPTY.TITLE: No matching reviews
EMPTY.SUBTITLE: Try adjusting the filters or reset the demo data to reload the full review log.

DRAWER.ORDER_BREAKDOWN_SUBTITLE: Internal view of delivery, packaging, and accuracy for this review.
DRAWER.MEDIA_SUBTITLE: Images or screenshots attached to the current review.
DRAWER.REPLY_SUBTITLE: Write a clear professional response that appears as the vendor reply and can be updated later.
DRAWER.REPLY_PLACEHOLDER: Write a short professional reply that explains the action taken or the relevant clarification...

FEEDBACK.REVIEW_HIDDEN: The review was hidden from the current view.
FEEDBACK.SEED_RESET: The demo reviews data was reset.

ALERTS_CENTER.TITLE: Alerts Center
ALERTS_CENTER.SUBTITLE: Track operational alerts derived from orders, products, finance, support, and the rest of the vendor workspace.

SUMMARY.UNREAD_HINT: Items that still have not been reviewed in the alerts center.
SUMMARY.NEEDS_ACTION_HINT: Alerts with warning or operational weight.
SUMMARY.ARCHIVED_HINT: Alerts you kept for later reference.

ALERTS_CENTER.SECTION_SUBTITLE: Track sources, severity, and state, then open the related page directly from the alert.

FILTERS.TITLE: Filters
FILTERS.SUBTITLE: Refine alerts by source, severity, and state from one place.

POPOVER.SUBTITLE: Highest current priorities that are not archived
POPOVER.EMPTY_SUBTITLE: Any new alert will show up here as soon as it is generated.

EMPTY.TITLE: No matching alerts
EMPTY.SUBTITLE: Try adjusting the filters or revisit when the operational data changes.

FEEDBACK.MARKED_READ: The alert was marked as read.
FEEDBACK.MARKED_UNREAD: The alert was marked as unread again.
FEEDBACK.RESTORED: The alert was restored from the archive.
FEEDBACK.ALL_READ: All alerts were marked as read.

SUPPORT_CENTER.TITLE: Support & Reference Center
SUPPORT_CENTER.SUBTITLE: Track active support tickets and browse operational guides from one page with the same clear super admin-inspired structure.

SUMMARY.OPEN_TICKETS_HINT: Cases that still require follow-up or final closure from support.
SUMMARY.PENDING_FOLLOWUPS_HINT: Tickets that still need a document or clarification from your team.
SUMMARY.AVG_RESPONSE_HINT: Approximate average time for the first response from support.
SUMMARY.REFERENCE_COUNT_HINT: Quick guides and policies you can review before opening a new case.

FILTERS.TITLE: Filters
FILTERS.SUBTITLE: Refine the current view by status, category, priority, or article type.

SEARCH.TICKETS: Search by ticket reference, subject, or summary

SECTIONS.SUPPORT_SUBTITLE: Review current tickets and continue the conversation from the same screen.
SECTIONS.REFERENCE_SUBTITLE: Short guides and policies to check before opening a new ticket.

DETAIL.THREAD_SUBTITLE: Every reply between your team and support appears here in time order.
DETAIL.RELATED_REFERENCE_SUBTITLE: Guides and policies from the same category that can help close the case faster.
DETAIL.COMPOSER_SUBTITLE: Send the update or clarification needed to move the case forward.
DETAIL.MESSAGE_PLACEHOLDER: Write your reply or the clarification you want to add to this ticket

REFERENCE.RELATED_TICKETS_SUBTITLE: Recent tickets from the same category so the reference stays connected to similar cases.

CREATE.TITLE: Open a Support Case
CREATE.SUBTITLE: Provide a clear summary so the request reaches the right team quickly.
CREATE.MESSAGE_PLACEHOLDER: Explain the issue, request, and the steps already taken before contacting support

EMPTY.TICKETS_TITLE: No tickets match the current view
EMPTY.TICKETS_SUBTITLE: Try lighter filters or create a new ticket from the top action.
EMPTY.SELECT_TICKET_TITLE: Select a case to view its details
EMPTY.SELECT_TICKET_SUBTITLE: Choose a ticket from the table to load its summary and conversation.
EMPTY.ARTICLES_TITLE: No articles match the current filters
EMPTY.ARTICLES_SUBTITLE: Adjust the search or filters to surface the right guides.
EMPTY.SELECT_ARTICLE_SUBTITLE: Pick any article from the list to load its operational details.
EMPTY.RELATED_REFERENCE: There are no related references for this category right now.
EMPTY.RELATED_TICKETS: There are no related tickets for this category right now.

FEEDBACK.TICKET_CREATED: The support ticket was created successfully.
FEEDBACK.MESSAGE_SENT: Your reply was sent to the ticket.
FEEDBACK.SEED_RESET: The demo support workspace was reset.

VENDOR_FINANCE.TITLE: Financial Overview
VENDOR_FINANCE.SUBTITLE: Track payouts, fees, holds, and recent movements with the same operational clarity used in super admin.

OVERVIEW.IN_NEXT_CYCLE: Will be included in the next cycle

CHART.TITLE: Sales vs payouts trend
CHART.SUBTITLE: Compare what was sold against what is already moving into settlement.

SETTLEMENTS.TITLE: Upcoming Settlements
SETTLEMENTS.SUBTITLE: The latest settlement batches scheduled for your account.

LEDGER.TITLE: Recent Ledger

ALERTS.SUBTITLE: Items that may need action before the next payout cycle.

ALERTS.HOLD_BODY: Some orders are still within the return window, so part of the settlement remains temporarily reserved.
